title: peponidium horridum
intro: Peponidium horridum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and wounds. Herbal preparations of Peponidium horridum include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
